title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
company: Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
